turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thanks for calling tech support, this is Taylor. What's going on?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Heads up, we record support calls for training.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Let me verify you first. What name is the account under?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Sure, it's my name with the email I always use.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: The app won't load at all, it just sits on a blank screen.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Okay, let me walk you through a couple of checks.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Let's clear the app cache and reopen it, that fixes most blank screens.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Alright, it's coming back up I think.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Glad it's working now. Is there anything else I can help with?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: No, that's it. Thanks for sticking with it.
